GarudaGemsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbolMultiplierFeature1: At the start of any main game spin, the win multiplier is x1.
GarudaGemsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbolMultiplierFeature2: During any spin, every Wild symbol on the reels will be collected.
GarudaGemsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodySymbolMultiplierFeature3: Once 3 Wild symbols have been collected, the win multiplier will be increased to x3, with every additional 3 Wild symbols collected increasing the win multiplier by 3 as well.
GarudaGemsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature1: 3 Free Spin symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 10 free spins. Each additional Free Spin symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
GarudaGemsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature2: At the start of the Free Spins Feature, the win multiplier is x1.
GarudaGemsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature3: During any spin, every Wild symbol on the reels will be collected.
GarudaGemsPayoutAndRulesShared.BodyFreeSpinFeature4: Once 3 Wild symbols have been collected, the win multiplier will be increased to x3, with every additional 3 Wild symbols collected increasing the win multiplier by 3 as well.
GarudaGemsPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Free Spin symbol.
GarudaGemsPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.
GarudaGemsPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
GarudaGemsPayoutAndRulesShared.GeneralRulesPayoutValue4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.

GarudaGemsRules.GeneralRules1: Garuda Gems is a 6-reel, 4-row video slot featuring the collection of Wild Symbols to increase the win multiplier.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{4096} ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be minimum bet level, maximum max level, minimum bet size and maximum bet size in numeric form.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{4096} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.05 to 50.

GarudaGemsRules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.
